name: Backpacker Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream butter with 1 cup brown sugar until smooth.
3. Stir in oats, wheat flour, white flour, wheat germ, and orange peel.
4. Press mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
5. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, almonds, chocolate chips, chopped dates, dried apricots, and shredded coconut with the remaining 1/2 cup brown sugar. Mix gently but thoroughly.
6. Pour the mixture over the butter mixture and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until set.
8. Cool before cutting into bars.
